title: Jabba the Hutt 1 (disambiguation)
content:
'''Jabba the Hutt 1''' may refer to:

<gallery>
File:Jabba1.jpg|'''''[[Jabba the Hutt: The Gaar Suppoon Hit]]''''', the first issue of the comic series [[Jabba the Hutt (comics)|''Jabba the Hutt'']].
File:AoR-JabbatheHutt.jpg|'''[[Age of Rebellion - Jabba the Hutt 1|''Age of Rebellion - Jabba the Hutt'' 1]]''', an issue of [[Star Wars: Age of Rebellion (comic series)|''Star Wars: Age of Rebellion'']].
File:WarOfTheBountyHuntersJabba1.jpg|'''[[War of the Bounty Hunters – Jabba the Hutt 1|''War of the Bounty Hunters – Jabba the Hutt'' 1]]''', a ''[[Star Wars: War of the Bounty Hunters]]'' one-shot
File:ReturnOfTheJedi-JabbasPalace-1-Final-Cover.jpg|'''[[Return of the Jedi – Jabba's Palace 1|''Return of the Jedi – Jabba's Palace'' 1]]''', a [[Star Wars: Return of the Jedi (Marvel Comics 2023)|''Star Wars: Return of the Jedi'' (2023)]] one-shot
</gallery>

{{Disambig}}
